name: Vilnius (Lithuania)

colors.symbolism: the field of the city arms

description: A red field bearing the coat of arms of Vilnius — Saint Christopher carrying the Christ Child across a river.
history: Vilnius is the capital and largest city of Lithuania. Its coat of arms — Saint Christopher — has been used since at least the 16th century. The current flag uses the city arms on red.

features.role: Saint Christopher carrying the Christ Child
